creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 153058
Makefile with CPE information added

x11-fonts/libFS has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifer assigned (e.g. CVE-2013-1996). This patch add CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[0].

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
